projects.title: Project 01 — Motion Study
projects.short: A minimal motion system with a single rule set.
projects.concept: Explores motion using a constrained rule-based animation.
projects.whatItDoes: Generates a looping composition with subtle variation.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to bias the field.
challenges: Keeping it smooth while still feeling alive.

projects.title: Project 02 — Typographic Grid
projects.short: A grid that responds like an instrument.
projects.concept: Combines a strict grid with responsive typography.
projects.whatItDoes: Renders a typographic pattern that changes with input.

projects.title: Project 03 — Noise Terrain
projects.short: A calm terrain made from noise and light.
projects.concept: Uses noise to create depth and surface.
projects.whatItDoes: Draws a terrain-like field with animated lighting.
challenges: Avoiding heavy loops and keeping FPS stable.

projects.title: Project 04 — Particle Letters
projects.short: Letters that break apart into particles.
projects.concept: Turns a typographic form into a system of points.
projects.whatItDoes: Particles converge to form shapes, then disperse.
challenges: Making interactions feel intentional, not chaotic.

projects.title: Project 05 — Orbit Machine
projects.short: Orbits within orbits, drawn like a diagram.
projects.concept: Layered circular motion to build complexity.
projects.whatItDoes: Draws nested orbital paths with trails.

projects.title: Project 06 — Cursor Echo
projects.short: An interaction study: cursor as brush + delay.
projects.concept: Explores time-lag and memory in gestures.
projects.whatItDoes: Echoes your movement as a trailing waveform.
challenges: Making the trail expressive but lightweight.

projects.title: Project 07 — Cellular
projects.whatItDoes: Evolves a grid-based pattern over time.
challenges: Keeping the rule set readable and compelling.

projects.title: Project 08 — Audio Placeholder
projects.concept: A structure prepared for sound input later.
projects.whatItDoes: Draws a reactive composition using simulated input.
challenges: Designing a visual system that scales with sound.

projects.title: Project 09 — Modular Poster
projects.whatItDoes: Builds a modular poster with type + shapes.
challenges: Maintaining strong hierarchy across random outputs.

projects.title: Project 10 — 3D Study
projects.short: A lightweight WEBGL study with minimal geometry.
projects.whatItDoes: Renders a rotating field in WEBGL.
challenges: Keeping it fast on laptops and mobile.

projects.title: Project 11 — Final Composition
projects.short: A final piece that ties the semester together.
projects.concept: Combines motion, type, and interaction into one system.
projects.whatItDoes: Generates a composed scene with controllable parameters.
howToInteract: Use mouse + keys shown on screen.
challenges: Unifying multiple ideas into a single coherent piece.
